# Daria Pavljenko — Illustrator

> Daria Pavljenko is a professional illustrator and visual storyteller based in Rome, Italy. She specializes in editorial illustration, book covers, tarot card design, and surreal digital collage art. She is available for commissions worldwide.

## About

Daria discovered her passion for drawing as a child, inspired by her mother's sketches. Her first professional commissions were tarot card illustrations for a Ukrainian publishing house. Since then, she has expanded her practice to publishing, advertising, editorial, and freelance projects for clients around the world.

Her artistic style is surreal and atmospheric — blending illustration with collage, using soft pastel palettes to create the feeling of a faded dream. She works primarily in digital media.

## Specializations

- Editorial and book cover illustration
- Tarot card design
- Surreal digital collage
- Visual storytelling for publishing
- Custom commissions for advertising campaigns and fashion projects

## Commissioning Daria

- Base rate: $200 per illustration (includes commercial rights and digital delivery)
- Rush delivery (1-week turnaround): +50% premium
- Standard turnaround: 3–4 weeks
- A 50% deposit secures a project slot
- Two rounds of revisions included per project
- Large-scale or commercial campaigns (ads, fashion): contact for a custom proposal

## Contact

- Email: dariaillustrates@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/d.daria_________/
- Threads: https://www.threads.com/@d.daria_________
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/daria-illustrates/30min
- Portfolio: https://dariaillustrates.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How does the commission process work?**
Once the brief is submitted, Daria provides a quote and project schedule. A 50% deposit secures the project slot. The remaining 50% is due upon delivery.

**What licensing is included?**
Standard pricing includes full commercial rights for the commissioned illustration.

**How long does a project take?**
Standard turnaround is 3–4 weeks. Rush delivery (1 week) is available at a 50% premium.

**How many revisions are included?**
Two rounds of revisions are included in every project. Additional revisions are charged separately.

**Is Daria available for large commercial projects?**
Yes. For ads, fashion campaigns, or large-scale book projects, please reach out directly for a personalized proposal.

**Where is Daria located?**
Daria's studio is based in Rome, Italy. She works with clients worldwide remotely.
